description: A customer reports they have lost service and suspect a fraudulent SIM swap. The agent must investigate and secure the account.

nodes.task_description: Immediately place a security freeze on the account to prevent further changes.
Review the account's recent activity logs to find evidence of a SIM change.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds a log entry for a SIM card change processed 2 hours ago via an online channel.

nodes.task_description: Document the fraudulent activity and escalate the case to the fraud department.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a detailed fraud report and escalates it correctly.

nodes.task_description: Inform the customer of the next steps and provide guidance on securing their other online accounts.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly communicates the situation and provides helpful security advice.
